title: ASR Outdoor Complete Gold Panning Kit with Sluice Box and Classifier Screen Set
description:
The ASR Outdoor 21pc Gold Panning kit features 21 essential gold panning tools and equipment to help you strike it rich! Inside you’ll find a folding sluice box, gold pans, classifiers, collection supplies, and digging tools to aid in your gold prospecting efforts.

The mainstay of this deluxe gold panning kit features a 50” folding sluice box with precision laser cut riffles that will allow you to process and sift through silt and identify more materials than a gold pan by itself. It’s constructed of ultra-light aluminum that is ideal for traveling to new areas in the backcountry and won’t rust so you can count on it rain or shine.

We’ve also included a fine 1/2” sifting classifier that is designed to fit on a standard 5-gallon bucket
Deals Only
  • Our Store
  • About Us
  • Contact Us

Product Details

MPN: ASRODLXSBK2020
UPC: 855569004828
Features: LARGE FOLDING SLUICE BOX - Ready to use out of the box, the 50” folding sluice box will allow you to process and sift through silt and identify more materials than a gold pan by itself. It’s constructed of ultra-light aluminum that won’t rust so you can count on it in the harshest of environments
BUCKET CLASSIFIER SCREEN - Included is a 1/2” sifting classifier that is designed to fit on a standard 5-gallon bucket. It’s compact, stackable, and made with 304 stainless steel wire that will stand the test of time. Classifiers are essential to speeding up the efficiency of the panning process by separating larger rocks
ROCK PICK HAMMER AND DIGGER - 11” pointed tip rock pick hammer and steel digger trowel to assist with the rockhounding process. These heavy-duty gold prospecting tools will ensure that you can gain access to hard-to-reach areas to locate gold and precious stones
GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS - Also included are essential gold planning collection tools so you can grab, sort, and store valuable materials out in the field: two 3oz snifter bottles for grabbing gold flakes, two magnifying glass tweezers for identifying materials, a 16lb black sand separator magnet tool and six glass vials for storing the gold flake and gold nuggets you find
BONUS GOLD PANNING ESSENTIALS - Lastly we’ve added in a handful of gold prospecting equipment that will aid your efforts even further: two gold pans (12” and 10” diameter), a 1/40” mini classifying sifter, a brass coin probe, and a four-piece set of hooks and picks. All of these extra tools are great for sifting, identifying, and cleaning the materials you locate

ASR Outdoor Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit with 1/2 Classifier Prospecting Equipment 21pc

MSRP 229.99

The ASR Outdoor 21pc Gold Panning kit features 21 essential gold panning tools and equipment to help you strike it rich! Inside you’ll find a folding sluice box, gold pans, classifiers, collection supplies, and digging tools to aid in your gold prospecting efforts. The mainstay of this deluxe gold panning kit features a 50” folding sluice box with precision laser cut riffles that will allow you to process and sift through silt and identify more materials than a gold pan by itself. It’s constructed of ultra-light aluminum that is ideal for traveling to new areas in the backcountry and won’t rust so you can count on it rain or shine. We’ve also included a fine 1/2” sifting classifier that is designed to fit on a standard 5-gallon bucket. It’s compact, stackable, and made with 304 stainless steel wire that will stand the test of time. Classifiers are essential to speeding up the efficiency of the panning process by separating larger rocks. In addition, we’ve added a steel trowel digger and an 11” pointed tip rock picking hammer to assist with the gold panning process. These heavy-duty gold prospecting tools will ensure that you can gain access to hard-to-reach areas in crevices to locate gold and precious stones. Both the hammer and the trowel are rust-proof and ideal tools for panning in remote areas where you’re more likely to access rich gold-bearing gravel. Inside the kit, you’ll also find essential gold prospecting supplies so you can sort, grab and store valuable gold and materials out in the field: 1 16lb magnetic pick-up tool for identifying and separating black sand, six glass vials for storing gold flakes, two 3oz capacity snifter bottles, and two 4x magnification tweezers for easily identifying precious materials. Lastly, we’ve included a ton of extra gold prospecting tools that will assist you even further: a coin probe designed for metal detecting, a four-piece set of picks and hooks, two gold sifting pans (10” and 12” diameter), and a 1/40” small sifting classifier. These bonus tools are ideal for identifying, sifting, and cleaning the precious materials and gems you find. Gold prospecting is a great outdoor activity for adults and kids. Whether you’re just getting started or you’re a gold panning enthusiast, this deluxe kit includes all of the essential tools you’ll need to extract gold deposits and nuggets. Get out and explore the remote gold country!
